citation.article_title: PyTorch: An imperative style, high-performance deep learning library
citation.author: Paszke
citation.journal_title: Advances in neural information processing systems
citation.unstructured_citation: Paszke, A., Gross, S., Massa, F., Lerer, A., Bradbury, J., Chanan, G., Killeen, T., Lin, Z., Gimelshein, N., Antiga, L., & others. (2019). PyTorch: An imperative style, high-performance deep learning library. Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems, 32, 8024–8035. https://papers.neurips.cc/paper/9015-pytorch-an-imperative-style-high-performance-deep-learning-library

citation.article_title: CuPy: A NumPy-compatible library for NVIDIA GPU calculations
citation.author: Okuta
citation.journal_title: Proceedings of the workshop on machine learning systems (LearningSys) at the 31st conference on neural information processing systems

Proceedings of the Workshop on Machine Learning Systems (LearningSys) at the 31st Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems, 1–7. https://learningsys.org/nips17/assets/papers/paper_16.pdf

citation.article_title: JAX: Composable transformations of Python+NumPy programs

citation.article_title: SciPy 1.0: Fundamental algorithms for scientific computing in Python
